mapper.select: select dep_id, dep_name from department where delete_flg = false order by dep_id
select product_id, product_style_name, product_name from product where delete_flg = false order by product_style_name,product_name
mapper.delete:
update production_stats
delete_flg = true, update_date_time = current_timestamp
where production_stats_id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT} and delete_flg = false
mapper.select: select product_id, product_style_name, product_name, totle_num, total_price, total_time from product where delete_flg = false and product_id = #{productId,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.insert: insert into production_stats ( avg_output_per_person, order_delivery_days, planned_daily_output, price_per_unit, time_per_person, use_date, people_number, work_time, dep_id, product_id, create_date_time, update_date_time ) values ( #{avgOutputPerPerson,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{orderDeliveryDays,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{plannedDailyOutput,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{pricePerUnit,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{timePerPerson,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, CAST(#{useDate} AS DATE), #{peopleNumber,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{workTime,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{depId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{productId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, current_timestamp, current_timestamp )
